title: Kucaxttgeyes
description: A font pack, which the name is pronounced "Ku Caxts thy ki eyes" containing Ubuntu Fonts as its base and requires Caxton to work
body:
This is a Font Pack that customizes the font that Minecraft uses, and also you want to download it because sometimes, fonts from Linux Distros and/or Ubuntu Flavours can look better than fonts present in Microsoft Windows and/or any other closed source operating systems

Before Install: Install [Caxton](https://modrinth.com/mod/caxton), then install as a Resource Pack.

Plus: There is already a UbuntuSans and UbuntuMono release of it!

Featured Image:

![Featured Image](https://github.com/Ivan951236/Minecraft-UbuntuFonts-Caxton/blob/main/gallery/regular.png?raw=true)
